center.name: 额尔齐斯河
center.summary: 额尔齐斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黄胸鹀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Eggs of Emberiza aureola MHNT thumb|Yellow-breasted bunting (breeding male) thumb|Yellow-breasted bunting (female) thumb|Yellow-breasted bunting in flight The yellow-breasted bunting (Emberiza aureola) is a passerine bird in the bunting family Emberizidae that is found across the Boreal and East Palearctic
